description: Six legs on the adult body place an arthropod under 'nireku', the insect category. Wings, social life, diet, and ecological role vary enormously. 'nirowe' (spider) is an arachnid instead.
articulatory_notes: Dental nasal 'n' carries voice into high-front 'i'. A tap or brief trill starts stressed 're'; the back of the tongue then closes for 'k' and releases into high-back rounded 'u'.
usage_notes: Counts may use optional 'lipha'. A biological record can add the life stage, order, family, or species that the broad noun leaves open.

examples.translation: An insect is on the leaf.

semantic_domains.nature: the six-legged arthropod class across varied forms and ecological relations
